programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.
programme.sub-title: Yugi Vs. Rare Hunter Part 1 - Battle City Begins

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.
programme.sub-title: Yugi Vs. Rare Hunter Part 2 - Up Against Exodia

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck. Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up as long as he believes in the heart of the cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To counter Arkana's Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: the Dark Magician Girl!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes. Will Weevil's royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik's nefarious Rare Hunters, the silent but deadly Strings.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters: the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magic card Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts. If Joey wins, he'll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.
programme.sub-title: Double Duel Part 1 - Yugi and Kabia Vs. Lumis and Umbra

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?
programme.sub-title: Double Duel Part 2 - Yugi and Kabia Vs. Lumis and Umbra

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.
programme.sub-title: Double Duel Part 3 - Yugi and Kabia Vs. Lumis and Umbra

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!
programme.sub-title: Double Duel Part 4 - Yugi and Kabia Vs. Lumis and Umbra

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?
programme.sub-title: The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura Part 3

programme.title: After a frightening fall from the clouds, the Straw Hats find themselves trapped inside an impenetrable Marine stronghold. The crew gets separated, the Going Merry is impounded, and rumors of ghosts run rampant!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A state of emergency is issued! A notorious pirate ship has infiltrated!

programme.title: While Nami searches for the Going Merry, Luffy and Sanji pose as famous chefs, only to end up competing in a cooking contest with a beautiful mistress of the galley!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sanji the cook! Proving his merit at the marine dining hall!

programme.title: Zoro is imprisoned and interrogated, and Chopper’s ill-chosen hiding spot lands him in the operating room along with a doctor who can’t stand the sight of blood!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy’s insatiable appetite betrays his true identity, and yet another member of his crew ends up in the brig when two Straw Hats try to fool Commander Jonathan with the same disguise!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The marine's dragnet closes in! The second member captured!

programme.title: Commander Jonathan sets a Straw Hat trap, but Luffy and Sanji are willing to risk it all to help spring their mates. Will a souvenir from the sky save the day – or will their escape plan be scuttled by foul play?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy and sanji's daring rescue mission!

programme.title: Luffy and his gang make a break for the docks, and Commander Jonathan deploys armed guards in an attempt to slow down the Straw Hats. Only one thing is certain: somebody is going down for the count!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Enter the hot-blooded special forces! Battle on the bridge!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are surrounded, outnumbered, blasted with tear gas. Taking a pretty, young doctor hostage may be their only hope for surviving long enough for a Merry reunion!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Breaking through the seige! The going merry is recovered!

programme.title: Luffy and his crew were almost in the clear when Nami made a horrifying discovery: the Marines stole their gold! Now, the Straw Hats must sail straight into the thick of the fight to reclaim their lost riches!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The pirate ship disappears! Fortress battle, round #2!

programme.title: Usopp hatches a plan for a moonlit raid on the Marine vault, but Commander Jonathan is has a nasty surprise waiting for the pirates! Meanwhile, Sanji and Nami attempt to recover the waver.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The gold and waver recovery operations!

programme.title: The extreme arrogance of a Marine special investigator clears a path for Luffy and company to make their escape! Unfortunately, the Straw Hats still have to find their gold before returning to the high seas!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The one fell swoop plan! Jonathan's surefire secret tactic!

programme.title: The Straw Hats may think they’re in the clear, but Commander Jonathan has one final trap waiting to ground the Going Merry! If Luffy’s crew is to escape, they’ll need a helping hand – or eight!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Farewell, marine fortress! The last battle for escape!

programme.title: Luffy and his mates survive and near-death encounter with some mischievous sea monkeys only to land on a mysterious island where everything is much longer than it should be!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Great adventure at long ring long land!

programme.title: After a loyal horse and his recently-returned master are assaulted by thugs, Luffy is drawn into a Davy Back Fight with the Foxy Pirates. The Straw Hat captain never backs down from a challenge, but this contest could cost him his crew!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A davy back with the foxy pirates!

programme.title: The Davy Back Fight begins with a treacherous Donut Race around Ling Ring Long Land! The Straw Hats square off against the Foxy Pirates in a battle to see who loses a crew member!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Round 1! One lap of the donut race!

programme.title: Nami uses her considerable skill as a navigator to put the Straw Hats on the verge of victory, but the captain of the Foxy Pirates has more than a few dirty tricks up his sleeve!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Silver fox foxy! The merciless interference!

programme.title: Thanks to some foxy sabotage, Chopper has been lost to the enemy. The only hope for getting him back lies with Zoro and Sanji, but can they learn to work together in time to save the little reindeer?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Round 2! Shoot it into the groggy ring!

programme.title: Sanji and Zoro take a beating at the hands of the Groggy Monsters, but they won’t give up the fight. With a little luck – and some teamwork – they’ll emerge victorious from round two of the Davy Back Fight!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A barrage of red cards in groggy ring!

programme.title: Round three of the Davy Back Fight is a rip roaring roller derby! Chopper’s fate still hangs in the balance, and the Straw Hats have a huge problem: Luffy doesn’t know how to skate!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: As the Davy Back Fight sprints toward a sensational finish, the Straw Hats find themselves on the brink of defeat! Luffy’s finally managed to stay on his skates, but the Foxy Pirates are notorious cheaters!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A seriously heated race! Into the final round!

programme.title: The Straw Hats somehow manage to defeat the Foxy Pirates and win back Chopper, but Luffy eagerly accepts the challenge of a rematch! What is the captain thinking? And will his crew mutiny?
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: A devious game of dodge ball costs the Straw Hats their archaeologist. Now, they’ll have to win an unusual uphill race to reclaim Robin and avoid losing another crew member!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Showdown on the cliff! Red light, green light!

programme.title: Robin and Chopper have both been lost to the Foxy Pirates, and there’s only one match remaining in the Davy Back Fight! Luffy’s got a plan to get his mates back, but failure would mean the end of the Straw Hats forever!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The captains square off! The final combat round!

programme.title: Luffy and Captain Foxy go toe-to-toe in a brutal battle waged aboard a booby-trapped boat. Luffy is fighting for his crew, but Captain Foxy’s dirty tricks have him on the ropes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Full-blast slow-slow onslaught vs. Invulnerable luffy

programme.title: Luffy’s epic battle with Captain Foxy reaches its riveting end, and a very old man with a very tall horse reunites with a face from very long ago.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Epic, heated combat! The fateful final conclusion

programme.title: When Luffy and his mates lose their memory, Robin is the only Straw Hat who can remember their adventures together. Can she recover their recollections before the crew splits up?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Was it lost? Stolen? Who are you?

programme.title: Robin tries to hold the crew together while unraveling the mystery of the missing memories. Meanwhile, Nami and Zoro flashback to painful moments from their pasts.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A mysterious boy with a horn and robin's deduction!

programme.title: The Straw Hats finally discover the culprit behind their memory loss, but they’ve got bigger problems. The mysterious thief is determined to pit Zoro and Luffy against each other!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Now, let's get back our memories! The pirate crew lands on the island!

programme.title: Zoro and Luffy fight to the death, Nami attempts to orchestrate an uprising, and Sanji discovers he’s willing to kick a kid in order to get his memories back!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zoro bares his fangs! A savage animal stands in the way!

programme.title: The Straw Hats finally regain their memories, but a much larger challenge looms on the horizon. The mysterious thief is about to transform into something even more powerful!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The last counterattack by the memory thief who reveals his true colors!

programme.title: A terrible storm leads to another run in with the devious Captain Foxy! When Luffy makes the dangerous decision to help his old foe, it could spell disaster for the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy and his mates must survive another outrageous battle aboard Captain Foxy’s booby-trapped boat, and even if they survive, something far worse awaits them!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The guy who's the closest to invincible? And the most dangerous man!

programme.title: The Straw Hats take time out to help a group of hungry castaways, but trouble looms on the horizon. An icy marine adversary is out to track down Robin!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Navy headquarters admiral aokiji! The ferocity of an ultimate powerhouse!

programme.title: Chopper and Usopp work feverishly to save Robin from her icy tomb, and Luffy looks to settle the score with Admiral Aokiji in a man-to-man fight to the finish!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Duel between rubber and ice! Luffy vs. Aokiji!

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: The Crow, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: Visually stunning and action-packed, this hit movie, based on the comic book series, follows the return from the grave of a young rock guitarist who, along with his fiancée, is brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals.

programme.title: The Spirit, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: In the vein of BATMAN BEGINS and SIN CITY, THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: Fast Color, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Hunted by mysterious forces and a local sheriff, a young woman with supernatural abilities flees back to her family—and unearths the depths of the power within her.

programme.title: World War Z, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: The Crow, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: Visually stunning and action-packed, this hit movie, based on the comic book series, follows the return from the grave of a young rock guitarist who, along with his fiancée, is brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence, (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: World War Z, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: The Big Country, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Johnny Guitar, (1954, Western)
programme.desc: Gambling house operator Vienna seeks control of a town as archrival Emma Small sets out to force Vienna out of town. The timely arrival of Johnny Guitar thwarts Emma's dark plans, but doesn't prevent a showdown between the women.

programme.title: Paint Your Wagon, (1970, Western)
programme.desc: A Michigan farmer and a prospector form a partnership in the California gold country. Their adventures include buying and sharing a wife...

programme.title: The Great Scout & Cathouse Thursday, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: In this comedy western, Lee Marvin plays an ex-trail scout, and Oliver Reed is his half Native American partner who decide to settle accounts with a former partner who cheated them out of stolen money. But the partner has now joined high society!

programme.title: Trail To San Antone, (1947, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to help a young jockey get back on track after an “accident” arranged by a horse trainer ruins his career. Action-packed adventure with fantastic stunts, and Gene Autry's Champion.

programme.title: Twilight On The Rio Grande, (1947, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry's investigation of the murder of his partner, leads him to Mexico, where he becomes involved with the beautiful singer whose father has also been killed, and finds a jewelry smuggling ring.

programme.title: Loaded Pistols, (1949, Western)
programme.desc: Seeking a man who has killed his best friend in a poker game, Gene Autry finds a cowboy hiding from a posse. The young man's gun is the murder weapon yet Gene is convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill And The Indians, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: The Ride Back, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: A lawman's grim duty and an outlaw's despair collide as Texas Marshal Hamish (William Conrad) must transport outlaw Kallen (Anthony Quinn) to face justice. But when Hamish is seriously wounded, which will Kallen choose: freedom or redemption?

programme.title: Defiance, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Defiance is a riveting adventure that showcases the extraordinary true story of the Bielski brothers, simple farmers -outnumbered and outgunned- who turned a group of war refugees into powerful freedom fighters.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Tropic Thunder, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black and Robert Downey Jr. lead an ensemble cast in 'Tropic Thunder,' an action comedy about a group of self-absorbed actors who set out to make the most expensive war film.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Lead Crow finds a note left behind by her deceased friend Sailor Aluminum Siren that contains information on Sailor Moon’s true identity.
programme.sub-title: The Stolen Silver Crystal: Princess Kakyu Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Princess Kakyu appears before the Sailor Guardians. Princess Kakyu explains that she has come to Earth in search of the Light of Hope.
programme.sub-title: Crusade for the Galaxy: Legend of the Sailor Wars

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi finally confesses to Rei that she’s been unable to get in touch with Mamoru. The Three Lights publicly announce their intention to disband.
programme.sub-title: Princess Kakyu Perishes: Advent of Galaxia

programme.desc: Princess Kakyu perishes after being defeated by Galaxia. The Sailor Star Lights go after Galaxia to avenge their fallen princess.
programme.sub-title: Countdown to Destruction: The Sailor Guardians' Last Battle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Mars, Mercury, Jupiter and Venus lose their star seeds after shielding Sailor Moon and the Star Lights from Galaxia’s attack.
programme.sub-title: Ruler of the Galaxy: The Menace of Galaxia

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Uranus and Neptune have turned against the Sailor Guardians by swearing allegiance to Galaxia.
programme.sub-title: Dying Stars: Uranus and Neptune's Last Stand

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Galaxia is revealed to be the Legendary Sailor Guardian who sealed away Chaos. She has become corrupt and has gone on to conquer the galaxy herself.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: As Galaxia closes in to take Sailor Moon’s star seed, the Light of Hope reveals itself. The Light of Hope begs Usagi to use its power to stop Galaxia.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi Tsukino is clumsy at times and a bit of a crybaby. Luna, a black cat with a crescent moon on her forehead, gives Usagi a miracle brooch.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi becomes close with Ami Mizuno, a genius with an IQ of 300. But there's something odd about the students at Ami's seminar.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Disturbing rumors about a certain bus swirl all around Usagi. Amid the rumors, Usagi meets a beautiful shrine maiden with black hair named Rei Hino.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi learns of a secret treasure exhibit and, suspecting it might be the 'Legendary Silver Crystal,' sneaks into the embassy of Kingdom D.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: All of Juban Middle School is talking about the 'cursed bridal shop,' where every man who visits is said to disappear.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: O Regresso, (2015)

programme.title: Jogo de Espiões, (2001)

programme.title: Los Angeles: Cidade Proibida, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kevin Spacey, Russell Crowe, Guy Pearce, James Cromwell, Kim Basinger Diretor: Curtis Hanson

programme.title: O Fã: Obsessão Cega, (1981)

programme.title: A Felicidade Não se Compra, (1946)

George começa a perceber quantas vidas ele mudou e impactou e como elas seriam diferentes se ele nunca tivesse existido. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: James Stewart, Donna Reed, Lionel Barrymore, Thomas Mitchell, Henry Travers, Beulah Bondi, Ward Bond, H.B. Warner, Gloria Grahame, Frank Faylen Diretor: Frank Capra

programme.title: O Estranho, (1980)
programme.desc: 1980. programme.desc: 1970. Depois que Bela escuta Matilda atendendo ao telefone e chamando alguém de namorado, começa a investigar; Matilda desliga a ligação de Rodrigo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Matilda está com Rodrigo no escritório e está cansada de ser chamada de Maria, mas não pode revelar a verdade; Gabito e Brela conversam seriamente sobre filhos e futuro. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Felicia começa a se impor diante de Rodrigo e ele fica surpreso com essa nova atitude; Beatriz continua gripada por ter se escondido no banheiro para evitar Estefanía. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Pintando 7 com Gaspar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Passeio por Olinda e Caruaru, no estado de Pernambuco. Em Olinda, programa conhece o centro histórico, igrejas, um pouco da história de Olinda e o planetário. Já em Caruaru, conhece a festa de São João. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Encontrando o Amor em Sugarcreek, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pai e filho fugindo de uma tragédia chocante e brutal se instalam na cidade predominantemente amish de Sugarcreek, Ohio. Eles são acolhidos por três irmãs que oferecem ao pai um trabalho de faz-tudo, mas uma policial local começa a desconfiar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Paixão Fatal, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um professor universitário alcoólatra em recuperação, tentando recompor sua vida, conhece uma nova aluna sedutora. Ela oferece a ele uma fuga sensual da realidade até que ele perceba que ela pode estar louca. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Um Encontro com o Destino, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Margaret dirige uma agência de arquitetos em pleno crescimento. Ela recebe subitamente duas notícias: sua prima e grande amiga Susan morreu em um acidente de carro com o marido. No testamento, Susan e Hank deixam a guarda para ela. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Entre o Amor e a Fama, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma estrela de reality show sai de Hollywood e parte em direção a Amish Country, onde ela deve decidir entre viver sua nova realidade ou voltar para a antiga. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Sem Controle, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jack trabalha como matador de aluguel, mas sua vida solitária é alterada por dois estranhos: uma cantora e um cientista. Jack e a moça se apaixonam, mas à medida que seu relacionamento fica mais forte, ele fica fisicamente mais fraco e doente. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Siga Seu Coração, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após deixar a comunidade Amish, Kathy Yoder torna-se uma escritora de guias de viagem. Porém, forçada a voltar e resolver assuntos deixados pelo pai, ela relembra o que é fazer parte de uma comunidade. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Bela e a Fera, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pessoas de um vilarejo estão sendo brutalmente assassinadas e a Fera é acusada de ser a responsável pelas mortes. Acreditando em sua inocência, Bela e Fera se juntam para descobrir e combater o responsável pelos crimes. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Verdade e Justiça, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1870, na Estônia, o jovem Andrés, juntamente com sua esposa, chega a uma fazenda para estabelecer sua nova vida. Desolada e negligenciada entre os pântanos, a propriedade deve ser transformada em um lugar que abrigará a família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Menina e o Leão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mia é uma jovem de 14 anos que sempre teve uma profunda amizade com Charlie, um leão branco da fazenda de sua família. Um dia, seu pai decide vender o felino para caçadores de troféus e ela não vê outra opção além de fugir com Charlie para salvá-lo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sem Rastros, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que uma menina desaparece de um parque de trailers, o pai e a mãe da garota decidem fazer justiça com as próprias mãos. A busca desesperada dos pais pela verdade acaba levando a uma revelação chocante. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Pedido Especial, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um jovem de 18 anos e seu avô trocam de corpo após um acidente automobilístico. O avô resolve aproveitar a vida novamente, enquanto o neto fica preso ao corpo do idoso no hospital. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sobibor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O oficial soviético Alexander Pechersky organiza uma revolta e uma fuga em massa dos prisioneiros de Sobibor, um campo de extermínio, em outubro de 1943. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Lobo em Pele de Cordeiro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em uma terra mágica, em um prado calmo onde ovelhas podem viver sem preocupações, problemas começam a aparecer quando uma alcateia se estabeleceu nas proximidades. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Bons de Bico, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois perus rivais encontram uma máquina do tempo e fazem uma viagem maluca ao passado, para o século XVII, para tentar retirar o peru do cardápio tradicional do Dia de Ação de Graças. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Meu Trabalho É um Parto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Desesperada, Thea finge estar grávida para não perder o emprego. O único problema é que a gravidez é uma mentira e agora ela precisa fazer de tudo para convencer a todos de que realmente está esperando um bebê. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma Paixão em Seoul, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Kim é uma jovem filipina que vive com seus pais superprotetores. Quando descobre uma vaga para ensinar inglês a um empresário em Seul, ela foge para uma vida nova. Ela só não espera viver um triângulo amoroso com seu aluno e o assistente dele. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Doutor da Felicidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doutor Knock é um ex-bandido que se tornou um médico e chega à pequena aldeia de Saint-Maurice para fazer os moradores acreditarem que não são saudáveis e, assim, poder exercer sua profissão de forma lucrativa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 1988. Os carros e postos de gasolina da cidade estão tendo seus tanques esvaziados por um estranho dardo chamado Ira da Lua. programme.title: 1988. Ninguém sabe o que acontece. Os animais de estimação do bairro inteiro estão desaparecendo. O responsável é ninguém menos que Makunba, o ninja caçador. programme.desc: South Park - T03E02

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. Enquanto isso, um dos professores está sendo atormentado por uma recordação de sua falecida namorada, e Kenny conquista um homem rico na aula de cozinha. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. Enquanto isso, Kenny tenta evitar que seus pais tenham outro filho. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker

programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T05E13

programme.title: 2002. Os rapazes ganham muitos doces em um concurso, mas para conseguir o grande prêmio, precisam do cupom vencedor, que é aquele que ficou com Kenny antes de morrer. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T06E12

programme.title: 2005. Kenny consegue o último videogame portátil da cidade. programme.desc: South Park - T09E04

programme.title: 2008. Numa homenagem ao filme de 1981, Heavy Metal, os garotos estão tentando convencer Kenny a largar a última droga da moda que viciou rapidamente os alunos do ensino médio. programme.desc: South Park - T12E03

programme.title: 2009. Kenny leva sua namorada ao show dos Jonas Brothers, mas com segundas intenções. programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde o controle e o espírito da Raposa de Nove Caudas assume o comando. Kakashi consegue suprimir a Raposa de Nove Caudas. Deidara descobre a derrota de Sasori. A equipe Guy cerca Deidara, que tenta se explodir junto com os ninjas da folha! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T02E55
programme.sub-title: Ikalgo x e o x Relâmpago
programme.desc: 2013. O assassino Ikalgo, uma Formiga Quimera, ataca Killua. Killua o captura e diz que o deixará viver se ele revelar as habilidades de seu aliado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T03E01
programme.sub-title: O Poder x e x os Jogos
programme.desc: 2013. Gon tenta se conectar com uma Formiga Quimera, embora seja arriscado, Gon quer ganhar sua confiança. Ela revela que o seu objetivo é derrotar o Rei. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E27
programme.desc: 2016. Kira vive como Kosaku Kawajiri, mas tem vontade de matar depois de ver o pescoço da esposa. Josuke e Okuyasu encontram um homem estranho em um campo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E28
programme.desc: 2016. Rohan suspeita que Josuke está trapaceando nos dados e aposta que consegue descobrir como. Se Rohan ganhar a próxima rodada, Josuke perderá um dedo mindinho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: Death Note - T01E05
programme.desc: 2007. Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.title: Death Note - T01E06
programme.desc: 2007. Light se reune com uma mulher no departamento de polícia, pois tem uma mensagem importante para o Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E29
programme.desc: 1995. Enquanto Guile e Chun-Li lutam na área externa, Ryu e Ken enfrentam muitas dificuldades na batalha contra Bison. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kōji Tsujitani, Kenji Haga, Chisa Yokoyama, Tesshō Genda, Kenji Utsumi, Ryōichi Tanaka Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E01
programme.sub-title: A Viagem! Um Convite a São Francisco
programme.desc: 1995. Ryu vai aos EUA visitar Ken, seu parceiro de treinamento. Depois de lutarem com soldados em um bar, eles se deparam com um novo desafiante. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E85
programme.desc: 2018. Para conseguir sair da barreira, Boruto busca desesperadamente pelo coração de pedra, mas não o encontra. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E86
programme.desc: 2018. Ohnoki leva Boruto a um lugar especial para explicar sua opinião sobre do futuro, opinião essa formada após a perda de Kozuchi, seu neto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Naruto: Um Novo Treinamento Começa! Eu Serei Forte! - T01E86
programme.sub-title: Um Novo Treinamento Começa! Eu Serei Forte!
programme.desc: 2020. Ferido mentalmente e fisicamente, Sasuke é levado à Aldeia Oculta da Folha por Guy. Mas a especialista médica, Tsunade, não está presente… Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água! - T01E87
programme.sub-title: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água!
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto finalmente começa o treinamento com Jiraiya. A técnica que ele aprende é a marca do Quarto Hokage, um gênio que levou três anos para realmente controlá-la. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Ponto Focal: A Marca Da Folha! - T01E88
programme.sub-title: Ponto Focal: A Marca Da Folha!
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto termina o primeiro passo do treinamento. Mas o próximo passo, fazer com que uma bola de borracha se exploda com chacra, torna-se ser extremamente difícil. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade - T01E89
programme.sub-title: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade
programme.desc: 2020. Orochimaru e Kabuto aparecem de repente diante de Tsunade e Shizune que estavam passeando. Orochimaru, ferido pelo Selo Ceifeiro da Morte do Terceiro Hokage, procura por assistência médica do prévio Sannin. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Impermanência - T02E60
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo realiza o jutsu de ressuscitação em Gaara. Gaara acorda cercado por Naruto e os outros e também por uma multidão de ninjas da areia. Percebendo a verdade por trás do jutsu de ressuscitação, todos demonstram seu respeito por Chiyo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contato - T02E61
programme.desc: 2008. Gaara e seus salvadores retornam à Aldeia de Areia. Após visitar o túmulo de Vovó Chiyo, Naruto e os ninjas da Folha têm que partir. Deidara aparece ferido na frente de Zetsu e Tobi. Na Aldeia da Folha, alguém tenta infiltrar um garoto na equipe Kakashi! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Companheiro De Equipe! - T02E62
programme.desc: 2008. Kakashi é hospitalizado devido à tensão causada por seu mangekyo sharinga. Apesar dos apelos de Shizune para enviar outra equipe, Tsunade afirma que enviará a equipe Kakashi para fazer o trabalho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T03E02
programme.desc: 2013. O rei aguarda a seleção. Ele convoca mestres de shogi e go e os derrota. O próximo é uma garota cega chamada Komugi, campeã de Gungi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T03E03
programme.desc: 2013. À medida que as batalhas ferozes entre as Formigas Quimera e os Caçadores continuam, o Rei e a Komugi continuam a jogar Gungi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E29
programme.desc: 2016. Josuke é perseguido por um Stand e tem que andar de bicicleta a mais de 60 km/h para não ser pego. Ele tenta ligar para Koichi, mas ainda não é seguro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E30
programme.desc: 2016. Kawajiri vai até o porão para confrontar um gato com um buraco na garganta, mas o encontra morto. No dia seguinte, uma planta estranha cresce na sepultura do gato. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: Pluto TV Anime Ação
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Presa Na Escuridão - T02E65
programme.desc: 2008. A nova equipe Kakashi segue em direção à ponte Tenchi. Quando Sai mostra seu desprezo por Sasuke, o antagonismo com Naruto aumenta. Yamato decide que eles passarão a noite em uma pousada para tentar melhorar as relações entre os membros de sua equipe. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Almas Ressuscitadas - T02E66
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura vê Sai trabalhando em uma pintura abstrata e encontra um livro de desenhos incomum no meio das coisas dele. Enquanto vão em direção à ponte Tenchi, eles se mantêm atentos contra qualquer emboscada. Yamato orienta sua equipe caso uma luta aconteça. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden - T02E67
programme.desc: 2008. Yamato faz uma simulação para avaliar as habilidades e técnicas de luta da equipe Kakashi. Sai abandona Naruto para concluir a missão simulada. Naruto fica uma fera e declara que, se é para ajudar a salvar o Sasuke, ele ficará na mesma equipe que Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Momento De Despertar - T02E68
programme.desc: 2008. O dia para capturar o espião finalmente chega. Yamato assume a aparência de Sasori e espera que o espião apareça. Para a surpresa de todos, o espião era Kabuto. De repente, Orochimaru aparece. A situação muda, e a equipe Kakashi se encontra em risco. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Desespero - T02E69
programme.desc: 2008. Ao enfrentar Orochimaru, Naruto liberta o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Quando Yamato vê a quarta cauda, lembra do que Jiraiya falou. Yamato deveria suprimir o chakra que afetaria o corpo de Naruto. O ninjutsu secreto de Yamato se torna aparente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Ressonância - T02E70
programme.desc: 2008. Quando a terceira cauda aparece, Naruto só consegue ver Orochimaru. Ele está cego até para seus companheiros de equipe. Sakura é atingida e cai inconsciente. Sai finalmente segue para sua missão secreta. Naruto libera a quarta cauda proibida. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Meu Amigo - T02E71
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde a consciência e é tomado por impulsos destrutivos. Os clones de Sai e Yamato testemunham uma batalha horrível entre Orochimaru e Naruto. O poder e a aparência de Naruto se tornam demoníacos, como se ele estivesse se transformando na Raposa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Ameaça Se Aproxima - T02E72
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto, mesmo transformado, não desiste de trazer Sasuke para casa. Sakura é ferida por Naruto, mas consegue usar seu ninjutsu para conter a agitação da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Orochimaru tenta deixar o campo de batalha, mas é confrontado por Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Invasão Da Akatsuki - T02E73
programme.desc: 2008. Orochimaru aceita levar Sai para o esconderijo. Yamato consegue parar a agitação de Naruto, mas os ferimentos de Naruto são graves. Quando ele volta a si, Yamato revela a ele e Sakura que Sai foi embora e que Danzo pode estar conspirando algo terrível. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sob O Céu Estrelado - T02E74
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e sakura ficam chocados quando descobrem que Danzo planeja trabalhar com Orochimaru. A equipe Dakashi é forçada a fazer uma pausa. Orochimaru percebe que está sendo seguido pelo clone de Yamato e decide usar Sai para despistar seus perseguidores. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Oração Do Velho Monge - T02E75

programme.title: 2009. Com Kazemaru ainda na equipe, por enquanto, Raimon pode avançar e se concentrar nos nacionais. E eles precisarão o primeiro jogo é contra a rápida Sengoku Igajima Junior High. Se não vencerem, o sonho acaba antes mesmo de começar. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E16

programme.title: 2009. A estreita vitória sobre Sengoku Igajima deu a Raimon confiança, mas do outro lado do torneio, todo mundo está chocado com a derrota completa de Teikoku nas mãos da Zeus Junior High, que é 10-0. O que Kidou deve fazer. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E17

programme.title: 2009. Com seu poder de fogo impulsionado pela adição de Kidou Yuuto, a equipe está pronta para enfrentar o Senbayama Junior High e sua defesa inquebrável. programme.title: 2009. Ichinose Kazuya está de volta! Como uma fênix, ele ressuscitou das cinzas e voltou para visitar seus velhos amigos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E19

programme.title: 2009. Raimon está se preparando para enfrentar seu próximo grande oponente, Kidokawa Seishuu, que por acaso é a velha escola de Gouenji. Certos membros dessa equipe ainda guardam rancor contra ele. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E21

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon Junior High chegou à final, mas todos estão ficando nervosos por jogar o aterrorizante Zeus Junior High. Endou está convencido de que não é bom o suficiente. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E22

programme.title: 2009. À medida que as finais contra Zeus se aproximam, o mesmo acontece com a expectativa e o medo de Raimon. A equipe está trabalhando duro, mas o nível a ser atingido parece estar além do alcance deles. Eles chegarão a tempo da final. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. O grande jogo com Zeus está quase em cima deles, mas Endou ainda não domina Majin The Hand. O treinador Hibiki decide que todos passem a noite na escola em um campo de treinamento para a festa do pijama. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E24

programme.title: 2009. É isso, chegou a final do Nacional. O Zeus Junior High venceu rapidamente e nada que o Raimon Junior High faça tenha efeito neles. Eles são realmente deuses. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Baby You Can Drive My Car
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) has trouble when Bullethead and Romeo (William Lee Scott, Merlin Santana) take the keys to the drivers education car.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Das Bootie
programme.desc: Steve and Regina (Steve Harvey, Wendy Raquel Robinson) take a romantic cruise, but everything seems to go wrong; Lydia (guest star Lori Beth Denberg) housesits.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - And Injustice for All
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) faces a judge (guest star Arnetia Walker) when Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn) takes him to court after he sells her a broken TV set.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Educating Piggy
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) have to take a computer course taught by Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn).

programme.title: The Dempsey Sisters
programme.desc: Three siblings (Cymphonique Miller, Denyce Lawton, Teairra Mari) return to their musical roots, agreeing to let their brother manage their family band.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Am I the Drama?
programme.desc: Are these the main characters or the villains of someone elses story?

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Small Bites and Kicked Up Cocktails
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out small bites that are packed with flavor; the menu is stuffed portobello mushrooms, BLT skewers with scallops and pesto, and the cocktail of the day is a blood orange Margarita.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Simple and Delicious
programme.desc: Yo-Yo kicks things off with a penne pasta with spicy Italian sausage and a garlic tomato sauce; she shows off her skills with her version of fried rice, complete with eggs shrimp and more.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out a Sunday dinner; its a homestyle recipe for slow-simmered short ribs and gravy served along with collard green and cabbage mix thats tender and well seasoned.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Ladies First
programme.desc: For ladies night, YoYo makes buttery and delicious lobster rolls and doesnt skimp on the meat; she then takes it up a notch with a pan-seared salmon, drizzled with a creamy pesto sauce, served with a side of sauteed broccolini.

programme.title: Back to the Goode Life
programme.desc: A successful New York banker goes from being boss to being broke after she is wrongfully accused of unethical banking practices.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: Adopted as a child, an anchorwoman (Essence Atkins) reconnects with her birth mother (Lynn Whitfield) and extended family when she attends the funeral of her father.

programme.title: Family Time - Forbidden Fruits
programme.desc: Tony gets a new client, who happens to be a very attractive woman; Lisa and Tony are struggling to complete a ten-day all juice diet.

programme.title: Family Time - The Help
programme.desc: Tony decides to hire an assistant, but Lisa is not happy with the attractive female candidates; Lisa insists Tony hire a male assistant.

programme.title: Family Time - Salt N Pepa N Spice
programme.desc: Lori hosts a charity event and calls on the girls from Salt-N-Pepa to perform; Lisa wants Tony to get a vasectomy.

programme.title: Family Time - Whats Ours Is Mine
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa go to couples counseling after arguing about a large purchase Tony made; Tonys father makes plans to come out of retirement and take over the business.

programme.title: Family Time - Troop Dad
programme.desc: Lisa agrees to host a baby shower but she finds herself overcome with shower plans; Tony is asked to take over as Ebonys troop leader.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Nerdy Mac
programme.desc: Bryanas standardized test scores prompt Bernie to send her to Jordans school, but she is so far behind that they threaten to move her back a grade.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Stone Nuts
programme.desc: Jordan tries to fit in with the popular crowd; after taking Bernies advice, he winds up losing his lunch money in a poker game.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Jack And Jacqueline
programme.desc: Wanda urges Vanessa to join an enrichment organization she once belonged to; they learn times have changed when Vanessa and her new friends are charged with shoplifting.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Manchild in Vanessa Land
programme.desc: Bernie learns Vanessa has a boyfriend, Rahim, who is 18 years old; when he discovers that the teen has a child, he hits the ceiling.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Dont Know Squad
programme.desc: Vanessa tries to increase her chances of being accepted into a college by joining the drill team, which pleases Bernie until he sees one of the squads provocative routines.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - California or Bust-Up
programme.desc: When Regina accepts a job in California, Steve must decide whether or not to move with his loved one.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Graduates
programme.desc: Steve looks forward to Romeo, Bullethead and Lydia graduating; Regina and Steve compete to secure a celebrity speaker for the commencement ceremony.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Back to School
programme.desc: Musician Steve Hightower becomes an inner-city music teacher.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: When Bullethead (William Lee Scott) gets arrested, Steve (Steve Harvey) finds out that being a teacher doesnt end at 5 p.m.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Uncomfortable Truths
programme.desc: Microaggression can kill.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Teaching While Black

programme.title: Blink Twice (2024)
programme.desc: When tech billionaire Slater King meets Frida, he invites her to join him and his friends for a dream vacation on his private island. However, when strange things start to happen, shell have to uncover the truth if she hopes to make it out alive.

programme.title: Posse (1993)
programme.desc: Spanish-American War deserters (Mario Van Peebles, Stephen Baldwin, Charles Lane) wind up defending a black township from a sheriff and his henchmen.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman (1978)
programme.desc: A rancher (James Caan) back from World War II helps a woman (Jane Fonda) fight a cattle baron (Jason Robards) who wants their Colorado land.

programme.title: Exodus (1960)
programme.desc: An Israeli nationalist (Paul Newman), a U.S. nurse (Eva Marie Saint) and 611 Jewish refugees break a 1947 British blockade.

programme.title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)
programme.sub-title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent (William L. Petersen) bends and breaks the law to nab an artist/counterfeiter (Willem Dafoe) in Los Angeles.

programme.title: An Inconvenient Truth (2006)
programme.desc: Former presidential candidate Al Gore campaigns to raise awareness of the dangers of global warming and calls for immediate action to curb the problem.

programme.title: An Inconvenient Sequel: Truth to Power (2017)
programme.sub-title: An Inconvenient Sequel: Truth to Power (2017)
programme.desc: Former Vice President Al Gore continues his tireless fight, traveling around the world to train an army of activists and influence international climate policy.

programme.title: Noah (2014)
programme.desc: God chooses Noah (Russell Crowe) to build an ark and save the animals and his family from an apocalyptic flood.

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)
programme.desc: A prince (Jack Huston) endures years of slavery to take vengeance on his adopted brother (Toby Kebbell), a Roman officer who falsely accused him of treason.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: After an act of terrorism leaves him with a personal score to settle, Capt. Kirk defies Starfleet regulations and leads his crew on a mission to capture a powerfully destructive force.

programme.title: The Tomorrow War (2021)
programme.desc: Soldiers and civilians travel to the year 2051 to join a global war against a deadly alien species.

programme.title: Tom Clancys Without Remorse (2021)
programme.desc: Seeking justice for the murder of his pregnant wife, an elite Navy SEAL uncovers a covert plot that threatens to engulf the United States and Russia in an all-out war.

programme.title: American Classic
programme.desc: Rehearsals begin for Richards Our Town and Nadia proves to be a directing challenge; Kristen bonds with Richards ex; Jon and Boyle take a fateful trip to Atlantic City and Nadia misinterprets Richards private rehearsals with disastrous results.

programme.title: Snack Shack (2024)
programme.desc: Best friends AJ and Moose seize the opportunity to run the local pools rundown snack shack. However, things take an unexpected turn when they meet Brooke, an effortlessly cool lifeguard who puts their big summer plans -- and friendship -- at risk.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much (1956)
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Knew Too Much (1956)
programme.desc: Plotters kidnap a U.S. couples (James Stewart, Doris Day) son to hide an assassination at Royal Albert Hall.

programme.title: Coffy (1973)
programme.desc: A nurse (Pam Grier) seeks revenge on those she holds responsible for her 11-year-old sisters drug addiction.

programme.title: Dirty Work (1998)
programme.desc: Unable to find gainful employment, two underachievers (Norm Macdonald, Artie Lange) establish a revenge-for-hire business.

programme.title: The Visitor (2022)
programme.desc: When Robert and his wife move to her childhood home, he discovers an old portrait in the attic of a man who looks just like him. He soon travels down a frightening rabbit hole as he tries to discover the true identity of his mysterious doppelgà¤nger.

programme.title: Lady Jane (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Lady Jane Grey (Helena Bonham Carter) rules England briefly with lusty Lord Dudley (Cary Elwes) in the royal confusion of 1553.

programme.title: Heavens Gate (1980)
programme.desc: A well-educated marshal defends immigrant settlers against cattle barons in the 1890s Johnson County, Wyoming.

programme.title: The Mod Squad (1999)
programme.desc: A police captain saves three young adults (Claire Danes, Giovanni Ribisi, Omar Epps) from jail, recruiting them to work under cover in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Red Dawn (1984)
programme.desc: Colorado teens (Patrick Swayze, C. Thomas Howell, Lea Thompson) fight back after Soviet-led paratroops drop into town for World War III.
